reasoning_content: It seems all test cases have 100.00/100.00 score. Let me check the score more carefully to see if there are any deductions.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/score.txt | grep -E \"functional-[0-9]+/[0-9]+\\.sysu\\.c\" | awk '{print $1, $2}' | awk '$2 < \"100.00/100.00\"'", "summary": "Find test cases with score less than 100"}

summary: Find test cases with score less than 100
